item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Great tale. Builds things up well, and while I wouldn't characterize it as a shaggy dog story, I think the change at the end helps the piece. There are some areas where tone and formatting could use some cleaning up, but overall enjoyable little piece. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
oh wow i had no idea this existed

lovely use of 4776, very pleasingly politicking, and i love the scale of it all

item.title: Jamcon 2019
item.content:encoded:
Hello everyone! After suddenly remembering Jamcon19 was a thing, I decided to write up a quick story for Day/Theme 1 (“Shaggy Dog”).

Another meaning of the phrase “shaggy dog” is an ultimately inconsequential item played off as something meaningful, basically exactly what Site-23 is.
